description_long: This is a medium-sized whisky bottle with a cylindrical body and a short, rounded shoulder leading to a narrow neck. The bottle is made of clear glass, allowing the amber-brown liquid inside to be visible. It features a black cap on top, which appears to be a screw cap, and several rectangular labels in dark and light tones, with some text and graphics visible on the front and back. The front label is the most detailed, with a combination of text and possibly a logo, while the back label is simpler and more utilitarian. The bottle's overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for display in an urban bar, shop, or home setting.
description: A clear glass whisky bottle with amber liquid, black screw cap, and detailed front and back labels.
description_view_0: Tall, cylindrical bottle with a black cap and a dark, rectangular front label featuring text and graphics.
description_view_1: Wider profile showing the bottle's side, with a large, light-colored label and visible liquid level.
description_view_2: Front view with a prominent label, black cap, and clear view of the amber whisky inside.
description_view_3: Back view showing a plain, dark label and the bottle's rounded shoulders.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle has a prominent rectangular front label in dark colors with white and possibly gold text, featuring a logo or graphic in the center. The back label is lighter and more utilitarian, with smaller text. Both labels are centered vertically on the bottle. The text is mostly illegible at this resolution, but the style is modern and clean.
attribute_bottle_cap_type: Screw cap, cylindrical, black plastic, smooth finish with no visible embossing or decoration.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Short and narrow neck, cylindrical with a slight outward flare at the base, no visible embossing or decorative elements.
